## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content strategy partnership between GrowthX and Biologica for upcoming brand launch](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Biologica needs \~50 ingredient pages and \~15 blog posts ready for late September launch](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed 6-week strategy sprint followed by execution phase, emphasizing quality/expert review](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Biologica wants concrete deliverables during initial engagement, focused on conversion-oriented content](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [GrowthX to revise proposal with clearer content production targets and 6-month execution phase option](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)

## Topics

### Biologica's Content Needs

  - [Launch timeline: Late September (tentatively Sept 22nd)](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [\~50 ingredient pages needed (shorter, fact-based content)](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [\~15 blog posts for learning center/resource section](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Focus on women's health, hormonal life stages, natural supplements](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)
  - [Content goal: Build trust, educate on specific product benefits](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Ongoing steady-state: 5-10 articles per month post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Approach

  - [6-week strategy sprint (potentially reducible to 6 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Emphasis on aligning voice, style, expert review process](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Fact-checking workflow using AI-assisted tools](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Integration of Biologica's existing product dossiers](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Consideration of LLM/AI impacts on consumer journey](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)

### Expert Review Process

  - [Biologica has internal expert (dossier author) for review](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [GrowthX proposed streamlined fact-checking system](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Potential to involve nutritionist-level expert for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Balance between SEO and conversion-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Differentiation from broad supplement brands (e.g. AG1)](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=2139.0)
  - [Emphasis on clinically-backed dosages for specific cohorts](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Importance of consistent brand tone and voice](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### LLM/AI Integration

  - [GrowthX monitors how products appear in AI-generated responses](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=2319.0)
  - [Strategies to optimize content for LLM citations and visibility](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=2358.0)
  - [Growing importance of LLM-sourced traffic for conversions](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=2415.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to revise proposal with:](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
      - [Clearer content production targets during initial phase](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
      - [Option for 6-month execution phase post-strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [GrowthX to send updated proposal early next week](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=2591.0)
  - [Biologica to review proposal and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=2481.0)
  - [Potential project kick-off as soon as a week from next Monday](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
  - [Continue discussions via Slack for any immediate questions](https://fathom.video/share/3zWyDXD3S8iiyEsmzQW9_FkM_xi-pdyq?tab=summary&timestamp=2595.0)
